# metrics

```go
import "github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/internal/metrics"
```

Package metrics registers Prometheus collectors for USB device discovery, phase transitions, and approval latency observations.

## Index

<a name="ObserveApprovalDuration"></a>
## func [ObserveApprovalDuration](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/metrics/metrics.go#L78>)

```go
func ObserveApprovalDuration(duration time.Duration)
```

ObserveApprovalDuration records approval processing latency. Measured from USBDeviceApproval creation to reconciliation completion.

<a name="ObserveDiscoveryEvent"></a>
## func [ObserveDiscoveryEvent](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/metrics/metrics.go#L71>)

```go
func ObserveDiscoveryEvent(eventType string)
```

ObserveDiscoveryEvent increments discovery event counters. Called by the agent discovery loop whenever a USB add/remove event fires.

<a name="ObservePhaseTransition"></a>
## func [ObservePhaseTransition](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/metrics/metrics.go#L85>)

```go
func ObservePhaseTransition(component, from, to string)
```

ObservePhaseTransition records transition counts. Labels include component name and the from/to phases.

<a name="RecordPhaseTransitionEvent"></a>
## func [RecordPhaseTransitionEvent](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/metrics/metrics.go#L130>)

```go
func RecordPhaseTransitionEvent(recorder record.EventRecorder, obj runtime.Object, component, from, to string)
```

RecordPhaseTransitionEvent emits Kubernetes events for phase transitions.

<a name="Register"></a>
## func [Register](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/metrics/metrics.go#L51>)

```go
func Register()
```

Register ensures custom metrics are registered exactly once. Called lazily by every Observe\*/Update\* function to guarantee Prometheus collectors are available before recording.

<a name="UpdateConnectionPhase"></a>
## func [UpdateConnectionPhase](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/metrics/metrics.go#L102>)

```go
func UpdateConnectionPhase(from, to string)
```

UpdateConnectionPhase updates connection phase gauges and transition counters. Decrements the old phase gauge and increments the new one.

<a name="UpdateDevicePhase"></a>
## func [UpdateDevicePhase](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/metrics/metrics.go#L95>)

```go
func UpdateDevicePhase(from, to string)
```

UpdateDevicePhase updates device phase gauges and transition counters. Decrements the old phase gauge and increments the new one.
